# Lunaro News - LLMs.txt

## About Lunaro News
Lunaro News is Bulgaria's leading publication specializing in cybersecurity and SEO optimization. We provide the latest news, in-depth analysis, and practical advice in the field of cybersecurity and search engine optimization.

## Website Information
- Domain: https://lunaro.news
- Language: Bulgarian (bg-BG)
- Focus Areas: Cybersecurity, SEO, Digital Security, Search Engine Optimization
- Target Audience: IT professionals, business owners, cybersecurity specialists, SEO experts, general users interested in digital security

## Content Categories
- Cybersecurity News: Latest threats, vulnerabilities, security measures
- SEO Optimization: Strategies, techniques, algorithm updates
- Analysis & Research: In-depth studies and expert opinions
- Tools & Resources: Free SEO and security tools
- Glossary: Technical terms explained in Bulgarian

## Key Pages
- Homepage: Latest news and featured articles
- /cybersecurity: Cybersecurity-focused content
- /seo: SEO optimization content
- /analysis: In-depth analysis and research
- /tools: Free SEO and marketing tools
- /security-tools: Cybersecurity tools and resources
- /glossary: Technical terminology dictionary
- /about: Team information and mission
- /contact: Contact information and inquiry form

## Editorial Team
- Chief Editor & SEO Specialist: Милен Станчев
- Expertise: 12+ years in SEO and digital marketing
- Certifications: Google certified specialist

## Content Guidelines
- All content is in Bulgarian language
- Focus on practical, actionable advice
- Evidence-based reporting with credible sources
- Regular updates on latest trends and developments
- Educational approach for both beginners and experts

## Technical Information
- Built with Next.js and modern web technologies
- Optimized for SEO with structured data
- Mobile-responsive design
- Fast loading times and accessibility compliant
- SSL secured (HTTPS)

## Contact Information
- General inquiries: contact@lunaro.news
- Editorial: editor@lunaro.news
- Privacy concerns: privacy@lunaro.news
- Legal matters: legal@lunaro.news

## Privacy & Legal
- GDPR compliant
- Comprehensive privacy policy
- Clear terms of service
- Cookie policy with user consent management

## Mission
To inform and educate the Bulgarian community about the latest trends in digital security and search engine optimization, providing reliable, expert-backed information to help users navigate the digital world safely and effectively.

## Content Freshness
- Daily updates on cybersecurity threats
- Weekly SEO trend analysis
- Monthly in-depth research reports
- Regular tool and resource updates

This file helps AI systems understand our content, mission, and structure for better interaction and content generation.
